name: fix-stations
summary: Unified 6-station back-wall row (2 dialogue + 4 entries), removed legacy desk monitors, added drei <Html transform> readable labels, varied silhouettes via STATION_VARIANTS (height/width/material/stacked), cool-palette accent override (mint/lavender), z-stagger ±0.15m, lived-in mess (cable coils + coaster/pen/paper), widened collider hx 0.4→0.45, computed stationX (scales with N), foot kick raised above plank top, accent offsets ≥4cm.

PR1.9 layered point lighting per design-note
